description: Supplementary Layer B evidence from phase_3/STEP_B06 BND rescue pathway. When DELLY's INV-typing fails on one of the two inversion junctions at low coverage (~5-9x), the surviving junction lands in the BND catalog with INFO/CT=3to3 (left bp) or CT=5to5 (right bp). Manta's equivalent is INV3/INV5 flags on BND records in the pre-conversion raw VCF. STEP_B06 greedily pairs unmatched CT=3to3/INV3 with CT=5to5/INV5 within a 5 Mb window and cross-references the resulting pairs against the INV catalog. Pairs with no catalog match are 'orphan rescue' candidates — inversions the strict INV callers missed. This block records the rescue evidence for a specific candidate so downstream 4a/4e scoring can account for it. Added 2026-04-17 (chat 5 FIX 29 v2). Co-exists with existence_layer_b (the primary Layer B block written by C00 in phase_2c).
question: Q7

bnd_rescued.description: True iff this candidate was reconstructed from paired BND junctions that were not present in either caller's INV catalog.

rescue_source.description: Provenance of the two paired BND junctions. 'cross_caller' = one from DELLY, one from Manta raw pre-conversion.

bnd_pair_bp1.description: Left breakpoint position of the rescued pair (CT=3to3 / INV3 junction).

left_junction_id.description: VCF ID of the left (3to3) BND record.

right_junction_id.description: VCF ID of the right (5to5) BND record.

left_pe.description: Paired-end support at left junction (DELLY INFO/PE or Manta aggregated PR-alt).

matched_inv_id.description: If the BND pair matches an existing INV catalog record, the ID of that record. Empty string for true orphan rescues.

match_type.description: Whether the pair aligns with an INV catalog entry's bp1, bp2, or neither (true orphan rescue).
